name: Lbi Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the pound cake lengthwise into three layers by first slicing off the top layer, then the bottom layer.
2. Spread the raspberry preserves between the 3 layers and re-assemble the pound cake.
3. Cut the assembled pound cake in half and re-freeze one half.
4. Slice the remaining portion of the pound cake into 8 pieces, ensuring each piece has 3 layers with preserves in between.
5. Place a peach slice on top of each piece.
6. Top each piece with a dollop of whipped cream.
Source: Lisa Clarke
